ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date when the election took place */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., national, local) */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "polling_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the polling period */,
  "polling_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the polling period */,
  "number_of_constituencies" INTEGER /* Total number of constituencies participating in the election */,
  "number_of_candidates" INTEGER /* Total number of candidates in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the constituency is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the constituency */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the constituency */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the constituency in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the constituency */,
  "major_industries" TEXT /* Major industries in the constituency */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the constituency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation or short name of the party */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the party's official website */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the party's headquarters */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats the party holds in the current legislative body */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party the candidate represents */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency where the candidate is running */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Current occupation of the candidate */,
  "political_experience" TEXT /* Political experience of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Change in percentage of votes compared to the previous election */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate in the election results */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate won the election */,
  "swing" REAL /* Swing in percentage points compared to the previous election */,
  "constituency_name" TEXT /* Name of the constituency (for convenience in reports) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, analyst, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical election */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage_change" TEXT /* Change in percentage of votes compared to the previous election */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate in the historical results */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate won in the historical election */,
  "swing" REAL /* Swing in percentage points compared to the previous historical election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the audit */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., verify, update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the audit */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election result related to the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituency_details" (
  "constituency_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency detail entry */,
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the constituency */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the constituency in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the constituency */,
  "major_industries" TEXT /* Major industries in the constituency */,
  "historical_significance" TEXT /* Historical significance of the constituency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituency_details_constituency_id FOREIGN KEY ("constituency_id") REFERENCES constituencies ("constituency_id")
)
